concerns.text: FR-010 requires a spot‑check on [deferred] of the generated variants, but the proportion to be checked is left as a placeholder. Without a concrete percentage or count the requirement cannot be deterministically verified.

SC-004 measures dataset validity by verifying that [deferred] of the sampled problems contain required variables. The use of the `[deferred]` placeholder means the success criterion lacks a concrete, observable threshold, making it unmeasurable.
